title: Starry Night
description: A breathtaking depiction of a swirling night sky over the village of Saint-Rémy-de-Provence, painted during Van Gogh's stay at a mental asylum. The bold, expressive brushstrokes and vivid blues capture both the beauty and turbulence of his inner world.

title: The Scream
description: One of the most iconic works in expressionist art, this painting portrays a figure overwhelmed by existential anxiety beneath a blood-red sky. Munch described the inspiration as a moment of sudden, overwhelming dread during an evening walk in Oslo.

title: Girl with a Pearl Earring
description: Often called the 'Mona Lisa of the North,' this enigmatic tronie portrait captures an unknown young woman glancing over her shoulder with a luminous gaze. The large pearl earring and soft lighting are hallmarks of Vermeer's masterful technique.

title: The Persistence of Memory
description: Perhaps the most recognized surrealist painting in history, this small yet powerful work features melting pocket watches draped across a barren landscape. Dalí explored the fluidity of time and the dreamlike distortion of reality inspired by his subconscious mind.

title: The Night Watch
description: Rembrandt's monumental masterpiece depicts a city militia company led by Captain Frans Banninck Cocq marching in full gear. The dramatic use of light and shadow, combined with the sense of motion and depth, revolutionized group portraiture in the Dutch Golden Age.
